questions.question: Which country does the beneficiary applying from?
questions.suggestedAnswer: The beneficiary is currently applying from {{beneficiary_country}}.
questions.guidance: Provide the country where the beneficiary resides currently.
questions.tooltip: Officers need to know the applicant's current location to determine consulate jurisdiction and visa processing rules.
variations: From which country is the beneficiary applying?
What is the beneficiary's country of residence?
In what country does the applicant currently reside?
Could you state the country from which the individual you are sponsoring is petitioning?

questions.question: What is your date of marriage?
questions.suggestedAnswer: Our marriage took place on {{marriage_date}}.
questions.guidance: Provide the official date as per your marriage certificate.
questions.tooltip: Officers verify the marriage date to ensure consistency with other submitted documents.
variations: On what date were you married?
Could you please confirm your wedding date?
What is the specific day, month, and year of your marriage?
When did your marriage ceremony take place?

questions.question: Where did the marriage take place (city & country)?
questions.suggestedAnswer: The marriage took place in {{marriage_location}}, and it was conducted according to our cultural and legal practices.
questions.guidance: Provide the full city and country.
questions.tooltip: Officers check the marriage location for authenticity and eligibility purposes.
variations: In what city and country was your marriage solemnized?
Please specify the location (city and country) where you got married.
Could you tell us the city and country where your wedding ceremony occurred?
Where exactly, by city and country, did you marry your spouse?

questions.question: How and where did you first meet your spouse?
questions.suggestedAnswer: We first met {{relationship_origin_type}}, and our connection developed naturally over time through regular communication and shared values.
questions.guidance: Focus on how the relationship developed naturally.
questions.tooltip: Officers assess whether the relationship started naturally and is genuine.
variations: Could you describe how and where you and your spouse initially connected?
What were the circumstances of your very first encounter with your spouse, and where was it?
Please explain the manner and location of your initial meeting with your spouse.
How did you two first cross paths, and in what place did that happen?

questions.question: When and where did you first meet in person?
questions.suggestedAnswer: We first met in person after knowing each other for {{courtship_duration}}, which helped us better understand each other and strengthen our bond.
questions.guidance: Approximate details are acceptable if exact dates are unclear.
questions.tooltip: Officers want to confirm the timeline of your relationship.
variations: What was the date and location of your first physical meeting?
Could you tell us when and where you first met face-to-face?
When and where did you and your spouse have your initial in-person encounter?
Please specify the date and place of your very first physical meeting with your spouse.

questions.question: How many times have you met in person?
questions.suggestedAnswer: We have met in person {{number_of_in_person_visits}} times, while maintaining consistent communication between visits.
questions.guidance: Be honest and approximate if unsure.
questions.tooltip: Officers assess commitment through in-person interaction.
variations: What is the total number of times you have met your spouse face-to-face?
How many physical visits have you made to see your spouse?
Could you state the total count of your in-person meetings with your spouse?
To date, how many times have you physically met with your spouse?

questions.question: When did you first start talking?
questions.suggestedAnswer: We first started communicating regularly at the beginning of our relationship, which gradually developed into a serious commitment.
questions.guidance: Consistency matters more than exact dates.
questions.tooltip: Officers analyze the progression of the relationship over time.
variations: When did your communication with your spouse first commence?
On what date did you initiate contact with your spouse?
Could you tell us when you and your spouse first began communicating?
When was the earliest point you started conversing with your spouse?

questions.question: When did you get engaged?
questions.suggestedAnswer: We got engaged after spending sufficient time understanding each other and discussing our future together.
questions.guidance: Engagement can be formal or informal.
questions.tooltip: Engagement timing helps verify relationship progression.
variations: What is the date of your engagement?
On what date did you become engaged to your spouse?
Could you please specify when your engagement took place?
When exactly were you and your spouse engaged?

questions.question: Walk me through your relationship timeline.
questions.suggestedAnswer: Our relationship progressed from initial communication to regular interaction, in-person meetings totaling {{total_time_spent_together}}, engagement, and finally marriage after {{courtship_duration}}.
questions.tooltip: Officers assess consistency across all answers.
variations: Could you describe the progression of your relationship from its beginning to now?
Please detail the key milestones in your relationship's history.
How has your relationship developed over time?
Can you outline the journey of your relationship for me?

questions.question: How and when did the proposal happen?
questions.suggestedAnswer: {{proposal_details}} The proposal reflected our mutual commitment and long-term intentions.
questions.tooltip: Relationship milestones help establish genuineness.
variations: Could you share the details of when and how you became engaged?
When and where did your spouse propose marriage?
Please describe the circumstances surrounding your marriage proposal.
Can you tell me about the event of your proposal, including the date and manner?

questions.question: Why did you decide to get married?
questions.suggestedAnswer: We decided to get married because of mutual trust, shared goals, emotional support, and a desire to build a life together.
questions.tooltip: Officers ensure marriage intent is genuine.
variations: What were your reasons for deciding to marry your spouse?
Could you explain the factors that led to your decision to get married?
What prompted you to make the commitment of marriage?
Why did you choose to take this step into matrimony with your partner?

questions.question: Tell me about your wedding.
questions.suggestedAnswer: Our wedding was celebrated with {{wedding_attendees}} in {{marriage_location}}, reflecting our traditions and values.
questions.tooltip: Wedding details help verify authenticity.
variations: Could you provide some details about your wedding ceremony and celebration?
Please describe your wedding event.
What was your wedding like?
Can you share information regarding your marriage ceremony?

questions.question: Did your families approve of this relationship?
questions.suggestedAnswer: Yes, both families were supportive and approved of our relationship and marriage. {{family_reaction_to_marriage}}
questions.tooltip: Family approval can strengthen relationship credibility.
variations: Do your respective families support your marriage?
Were your families supportive of your decision to marry?
Did your families express approval for your relationship?
What was your families' reaction to your relationship and marriage plans?

questions.question: Have you met your spouse's family?
questions.suggestedAnswer: {{met_spouse_family ? 'Yes' : 'No'}}{{met_spouse_family ? ', I have met my spouse\'s family and maintain ongoing communication with them.' : ''}}
questions.tooltip: Family integration shows relationship depth.
variations: Have you had the opportunity to meet your spouse's family members?
Are you acquainted with your spouse's family?
Have you been introduced to your spouse's relatives?
Do you know your spouse's family?

questions.question: How do you communicate when you are apart?
questions.suggestedAnswer: We communicate {{communication_frequency}} through {{daily_communication}} to stay connected despite distance.
questions.tooltip: Officers assess real ongoing communication.
variations: What methods do you use to stay in touch when you are not together?
How do you maintain communication with your spouse during periods of separation?
When you are physically apart, how do you typically communicate with each other?
What are your usual ways of communicating across distance?

questions.question: What language do you and your spouse use to communicate?
questions.suggestedAnswer: We communicate comfortably in a shared language that allows us to understand each other clearly.
questions.tooltip: Officers ensure effective communication exists.
variations: In what language do you and your spouse primarily converse?
Which language do you predominantly use when communicating with your spouse?
What is the main language of communication between you and your spouse?
Please tell me the language you and your spouse speak to each other.

questions.question: What do you do together as a couple?
questions.suggestedAnswer: We enjoy shared activities such as {{shared_activities}}, supporting each other in daily life.
questions.tooltip: Shared lifestyle reflects compatibility.
variations: How do you typically spend your time together as a couple?
What shared activities do you and your spouse engage in?
Could you describe your common routines or pastimes with your partner?
What do you and your spouse enjoy doing jointly?

questions.question: What are your spouse's hobbies and interests?
questions.suggestedAnswer: My spouse enjoys various activities and hobbies that we often discuss and sometimes enjoy together.
questions.tooltip: Knowing personal details reflects closeness.
variations: Could you tell me about your spouse's personal interests and leisure activities?
What does your spouse enjoy doing in their free time?
What are some of your spouse's favorite pastimes or hobbies?
Can you describe your spouse's personal pursuits?

questions.question: What does your spouse do for a living?
questions.suggestedAnswer: My spouse works as {{sponsor_employment}} and maintains stable employment.
questions.tooltip: Employment stability is reviewed.
variations: What is your spouse's current occupation?
Can you describe your spouse's profession?
What kind of work does your spouse do for a living?
What is your spouse's line of work?

questions.question: Do you share finances?
questions.suggestedAnswer: {{joint_finances ? 'Yes' : 'No'}}. {{joint_finenses ? 'We manage finances jointly with transparency.' : 'We maintain separate finances but make joint decisions on major expenses.'}}
questions.guidance: Joint or separate accounts are both acceptable.
questions.tooltip: Financial interdependence indicates seriousness.
variations: Do you and your spouse have joint financial arrangements?
Are your finances managed jointly with your spouse?
Do you share bank accounts or combine your income with your spouse?
Are your financial resources integrated as a couple?

questions.question: Why do you want to move to the United States?
questions.suggestedAnswer: I want to live with my spouse and build a stable family life together in the United States.
questions.tooltip: Primary intent should align with petition purpose.
variations: What is your primary motivation for relocating to the United States?
Could you explain your reasons for wishing to immigrate to the U.S.?
What factors have led you to decide on moving to the United States?
What is the purpose of your intended move to the United States?

questions.question: What are your plans after arriving in the US?
questions.suggestedAnswer: I plan to settle with my spouse in {{intended_us_state}}, integrate into the community, and contribute responsibly once authorized. {{future_plans}}
questions.tooltip: Officers assess post-arrival intent.
variations: What are your immediate intentions upon your arrival in the United States?
Could you outline your plans for settling in after reaching the U.S.?
What do you intend to do once you have arrived in the United States?
Can you describe your initial plans once you enter the U.S.?

questions.question: Who will you leave behind in your home country?
questions.suggestedAnswer: I will leave behind family and social connections while maintaining ties through regular communication.
questions.tooltip: Officers assess relocation impact.
variations: Which family members will remain in your home country?
Who will you be leaving behind in your country of origin?
Are there any immediate family members who will not be accompanying you to the U.S.?
Who among your relatives or dependents will stay in your home country?

questions.question: Do you own property in your home country?
questions.suggestedAnswer: If applicable, I disclosed any property ownership honestly in my application.
questions.tooltip: Property ties may be reviewed.
variations: Do you possess any real estate in your country of origin?
Are you the owner of any land or buildings in your home country?
Do you hold any property deeds in your country of residence?
Do you have ownership of any real property in your native country?

questions.question: Have you ever been arrested or charged with any crime?
questions.suggestedAnswer: {{criminal_history ? 'Yes, I have disclosed this information honestly in my application.' : 'No, I have never been arrested or charged with a crime.'}}
questions.tooltip: Security screening is mandatory.
variations: Have you ever faced any criminal charges or been apprehended by law enforcement?
Do you have any history of arrests or criminal indictments?
Have you ever been accused or convicted of a criminal offense?
Can you confirm if you have ever been taken into custody or prosecuted for any crime?

questions.question: Have you ever served in the military?
questions.suggestedAnswer: {{military_or_defense_background ? 'Yes, I have disclosed my service history truthfully.' : 'No, I have not served in the military.'}}
questions.guidance: Military service is not negative by default.
questions.tooltip: Military background requires review.
variations: Have you previously been a member of any country's armed forces?
Can you tell me if you have any history of military service?
Were you ever enlisted in a military organization?
Have you completed national service or served in a defense force?

questions.question: Have you ever been to the United States before?
questions.suggestedAnswer: {{previous_us_visits ? 'Yes, I have visited the US previously and complied with all visa conditions.' : 'No, I have never traveled to the United States.'}}
questions.tooltip: Travel history is verified.
variations: Have you made any previous visits to the U.S.?
Is this your first time applying to enter the United States, or have you traveled here before?
Can you confirm if you have entered American territory on any prior occasion?
Have you previously visited the USA?

questions.question: Have you traveled internationally before?
questions.suggestedAnswer: Yes, I have traveled internationally while respecting visa laws of each country.
questions.tooltip: International travel history shows compliance.
variations: Have you previously traveled to other countries?
Do you have a history of international travel?
Have you visited any foreign nations prior to this application?
Have you traveled outside your home country before?

questions.question: What is your age difference with your spouse?
questions.suggestedAnswer: My age range is {{age_range}}, and our age difference reflects our compatible life stages.
questions.guidance: Focus on compatibility and shared life goals.
questions.tooltip: Officers may assess age-related compatibility.
variations: What is the age gap between you and your spouse?
By how many years are you and your spouse apart in age?
Could you state the difference in age between yourself and your spouse?
How many years separate your age from your spouse's age?

questions.question: What is your educational background?
questions.suggestedAnswer: My highest education is {{highest_education}}, which contributes to our shared intellectual interests.
questions.guidance: Highlight how education supports relationship stability.
questions.tooltip: Educational background may influence relationship dynamics.
variations: Could you describe your academic history?
What is your level of education?
Please tell me about your schooling and qualifications.
What kind of education have you received?

questions.question: When did you get married?
questions.suggestedAnswer: We got married {{marriage_date}}, after spending {{months_since_marriage}} months in a committed relationship.
questions.guidance: Be consistent with your application documents.
questions.tooltip: Marriage timing affects relationship authenticity assessment.
variations: What is the date of your marriage?
Could you please provide your wedding date?
When was your marriage solemnized?
On what date did you and your spouse get married?

questions.question: How did you meet your spouse?
questions.suggestedAnswer: We met {{relationship_origin_type}}, which led to a natural development of our relationship.
questions.guidance: Be specific about how you met.
questions.tooltip: Meeting story is fundamental to relationship verification.
variations: Could you describe the circumstances of how you first met your spouse?
Where and when did you first encounter your spouse?
How did your relationship with your spouse begin?
Please explain the story of how you and your spouse met.

questions.question: How long have you been in a relationship?
questions.suggestedAnswer: We have been together for {{courtship_duration}}, with regular in-person visits totaling {{number_of_in_person_visits}} times.
questions.guidance: Emphasize the consistent nature of your relationship.
questions.tooltip: Timeline consistency is crucial for relationship verification.
variations: When did your relationship with your spouse begin?
For what duration have you and your partner been together?
Could you specify the length of your relationship?
What is the period of time you have been involved with your spouse?

questions.question: How do you communicate with your spouse when apart?
questions.suggestedAnswer: We communicate {{communication_frequency}} using {{daily_communication}}, maintaining regular contact.
questions.tooltip: Communication patterns show ongoing relationship authenticity.
variations: What methods do you use to communicate with your spouse when you are not together?
How often do you and your spouse typically communicate while living apart?
Please describe how you maintain contact with your spouse from a distance.
In what ways do you and your spouse keep in touch when you are in separate locations?

questions.question: How did both families react to your marriage?
questions.suggestedAnswer: Both families reacted positively to our marriage, as {{family_reaction_to_marriage}}.
questions.tooltip: Family acceptance strengthens relationship credibility.
variations: What was the reaction of your respective families to your marriage?
Could you describe how both your family and your spouse's family received news of your marriage?
How did your families on both sides respond to your union?
What were the sentiments expressed by both families regarding your marriage?

questions.question: Who attended your wedding?
questions.suggestedAnswer: Our wedding was attended by {{wedding_attendees}}, reflecting our strong family and social connections.
questions.tooltip: Wedding attendance shows relationship authenticity.
variations: Could you please list the key attendees at your wedding ceremony?
Who were the guests present at your marriage?
Please describe who was in attendance at your wedding celebration.
Who all was present at your nuptials?

questions.question: Do you have mutual friends?
questions.suggestedAnswer: {{mutual_friends ? 'Yes' : 'No'}}. {{mutual_friends ? 'We have mutual friends who can attest to our relationship.' : 'We are building our social circle together.'}}
questions.guidance: Mention how you connect with mutual friends.
questions.tooltip: Mutual friends provide additional relationship verification.
variations: Are there friends that you and your spouse share?
Do you and your partner have any friends in common?
Can you name any individuals who are mutual friends with both you and your spouse?
Are there shared acquaintances between you and your spouse?

questions.question: What is your petitioner immigration status?
questions.suggestedAnswer: The petitioner has {{petitioner_status}} status, demonstrating their ability to sponsor me.
questions.tooltip: Petitioner status affects visa eligibility.
variations: Could you state the immigration status of the petitioner?
What is the current legal status of the individual who filed the petition on your behalf?
Please specify the immigration category of your petitioner.
What is the petitioner's current visa or residency status?

questions.question: What is the household size?
questions.suggestedAnswer: Our household will consist of {{household_size}} members, with adequate financial support.
questions.tooltip: Household size affects financial support calculations.
variations: How many individuals reside in the petitioner's household?
Please state the total number of people living in the petitioner's home.
What is the current count of occupants in the petitioner's residence?
How many persons currently comprise the petitioner's household?

questions.question: How will you be financially supported in the US?
questions.suggestedAnswer: We will be financially supported by the petitioner's income at the {{petitioner_income_level}} level, with a household size of {{household_size}}.
questions.tooltip: Financial support verification is critical for visa approval.
variations: What will be your source of financial support once you are in the United States?
Please explain how you plan to cover your living expenses in the U.S.
Who will be responsible for your financial maintenance in the United States?
How do you intend to ensure your financial stability upon arriving in the US?

questions.question: Have you ever been refused a US visa?
questions.suggestedAnswer: {{previous_visa_refusal ? 'Yes' : 'No'}}. {{previous_visa_refusal ? 'I have addressed the reasons for refusal in my current application.' : ''}}
questions.guidance: Be honest about any visa refusals.
questions.tooltip: Visa refusal history requires detailed explanation.
variations: Has a US visa application you submitted ever been denied?
Were you ever informed that you were ineligible for a US visa?
Have you previously received an unfavorable decision on a US visa application?
Has any application for a United States visa been unsuccessful?

questions.question: Have you ever overstayed a visa in any country?
questions.suggestedAnswer: {{visa_overstay_history ? 'Yes' : 'No'}}. {{visa_overstay_history ? 'I have disclosed this honestly in my application.' : ''}}
questions.tooltip: Visa compliance history affects credibility.
variations: Have you ever remained in a country beyond the authorized period of your visa?
Did you ever exceed the permitted duration of your visa in any nation?
In any country, have you ever stayed past the expiration date of your visa permission?
Have you, at any point, remained in a foreign country longer than your approved immigration status allowed?
